properties.text: Harvest report Mustard Plot: Yield = 27.7 q/ha (221.9q from 8.0ha). Some grain damage from late rain. Up from last year (25.0 q/ha). Happy with results.. Sold 180.5q @ Rs.2602/q.
Harvested Rapeseed &Mustard from Mustard Plot today. Got about 218.6 quintals from 8.0 ha (27.3 q/ha). Mixed quality - some sections affected by disease. Similar to last year (28.3 q/ha).
Harvested Rapeseed &Mustard from Mustard Plot today. Got about 147.2 quintals from 8.0 ha (18.4 q/ha). Grade A quality - expecting good price. Similar to last year (18.8 q/ha).
Harvested Rapeseed &Mustard from Mustard Plot today. Got about 231.6 quintals from 8.0 ha (28.9 q/ha). Excellent quality, good grain fill. Similar to last year (26.6 q/ha).
Harvest report Mustard Plot: Yield = 35.5 q/ha (284.2q from 8.0ha). Grain quality looks good - no moisture issues. Similar to last year (36.8 q/ha).. Sold 247.6q @ Rs.3691/q.
Harvest report Mustard Plot: Yield = 38.4 q/ha (306.8q from 8.0ha). Grade A quality - expecting good price. Similar to last year (39.0 q/ha).. Sold 214.6q @ Rs.2945/q.
Harvested Rapeseed &Mustard from Mustard Plot today. Got about 350.5 quintals from 8.0 ha (43.8 q/ha). Grade A quality - expecting good price. Similar to last year (48.2 q/ha).
